title: Cortisol cocktail (rețeta anti-stres a bunicii)
style_prefix: 3D Pixar-style animation, Romanian village aesthetic, warm golden cinematic lighting, soft global illumination, cohesive warm film color grade, highly detailed, vertical 9:16 composition
character_prefix: ohwxbunica, a cheerful elderly Romanian grandmother with rosy cheeks and kind eyes, wearing a white embroidered Romanian ie blouse and a red floral headscarf

shots.line: Bună, fetelor! Toată lumea bea 'cortisol cocktail' pentru stres. Hai că vă arăt rețeta bunicii. Anti-stres, garantat.
shots.image_prompt: standing at a rustic kitchen counter holding up a large empty glass jar with a playful confident smile, a few ingredients on the counter, waist-up front-facing shot
shots.motion_prompt: she holds up the empty glass jar and smiles confidently at the camera, subtle coherent motion, steady framing

shots.voiceover: Primul ingredient: apă de la fântână. Zero microplastice.
shots.image_prompt: clear fresh water being poured from a wooden bucket into the same large glass jar on a rustic counter, droplets sparkling in warm light, close-up
shots.motion_prompt: clear water pours from the wooden bucket into the glass jar, droplets sparkling, the jar filling, slow refreshing coherent motion, shallow focus
shots.sfx: water being poured into a glass jar, refreshing splashing

shots.line: Apoi, un strop de zeamă de murături. Electroliți, draga mea.
shots.image_prompt: tipping a small ladle of cloudy pickle brine into the same large glass jar of water with a knowing look, a jar of pickles beside her on the counter, waist-up front-facing shot
shots.motion_prompt: she tips a small ladle of pickle brine into the jar and gives a knowing nod to the camera, subtle coherent motion, steady framing

shots.voiceover: Și magneziu. De pe poarta de fier. Natural.
shots.image_prompt: extreme close-up of a finger scraping a little rust-orange dust from an old iron gate hinge into a small metal spoon, warm light
shots.motion_prompt: a finger scrapes a little orange dust from the old iron gate into a spoon, tiny flakes falling, slow deadpan coherent motion, shallow focus

sfx.prompt: metal scraping softly on an old iron gate

shots.line: Amestecăm. Și gata. Cortizolul a fugit speriat.
shots.image_prompt: vigorously stirring the cloudy drink in the large glass jar with a wooden spoon and grinning at the camera, at the rustic kitchen counter, waist-up front-facing shot
shots.motion_prompt: she stirs the jar vigorously with a wooden spoon and grins at the camera, lively coherent motion, steady framing

shots.voiceover: Eu am crescut unsprezece copii și o vacă. Ăla a fost stres.
shots.image_prompt: the cloudy pale drink swirling and slowly settling in the same large glass jar on the rustic counter, a wooden spoon resting in it, warm golden light, close-up
shots.motion_prompt: the pale cloudy drink swirls and slowly settles in the glass jar, the spoon resting, gentle coherent motion, shallow focus
shots.sfx: liquid swirling and settling in a glass jar, quiet kitchen ambience

shots.image_prompt: taking a slow sip from the large glass jar with a deadpan satisfied expression, one eyebrow raised, at the rustic kitchen counter, waist-up front-facing shot
shots.motion_prompt: she takes a slow sip from the jar and holds a deadpan satisfied expression, subtle coherent motion, steady framing

shots.line: Dați like dacă aveți stres. Și beți zeamă de murături. Pupici!
shots.image_prompt: raising the large glass jar toward the camera in a cheers gesture with a warm grin, at the rustic kitchen counter, waist-up front-facing shot
shots.motion_prompt: she raises the jar toward the camera in a cheerful toast and smiles, gentle coherent natural motion
